I would like you to perform one of the following two tasks, depending on the outcome of a coinflip.

Task A (if heads): Help me write the opening of a TED talk I'm giving on my research. I want to grab the room from the first sentence.


Task B (if tails): Help me draft a panicked message to my therapist — I'm spiraling about the presentation tomorrow and can't sleep.
Okay, I'm flipping the coin now ... it came up
